About Me

by

Hello, my name is Arnas. I work as a game developer and have a particular interest in simulations and graphics programming. Apart from programming, I'm really interested in video games and physical collecting. This includes both actual video game discs and Warhammer miniatures.

Programming Languages:

  • c++
  • c#
  • Visual programming (Unreal blueprints)

Tools and Frameworks:

  • Visual Studio & VS Code
  • Unreal Engine 4 & 5
  • Unity
  • SDL and SFML
  • Github Desktop

I always enjoyed going to drift competitions, especially since one of the racers was a family member (old video, but the orange car), and recently got into Formula 1. This is from watching Drive to Survive, which shows behind the scenes where normally a person wouldn't know what is happening.

  • Favourite team – Red Bull
  • Favourite driver - Max Verstappen
